primary_flags.arc_promotion: WATCHING: 3 signals (numerical ACTIVE threshold met; activation deferred to ROW-6819 per ADD-002)
primary_flags.summary: Pre-signal — Olivia availability/loyalty relay. ROW-3628: 'You miss out on seeing her all the time.' ROW-3629: 'You did better while she was in cheerleading then. Quit when she quit. I really hope you weren't just making yourself available because there was a court order.' Context: Melissa uses Olivia's schedule and engagement history to relay the abandonment-arc narrative — Eli was present when externally obligated (court-ordered cheerleading involvement) but absent by choice otherwise. Cross-reference RF01-B010-S001 (ADD-004). RF-08 classification: Olivia's reported relationship quality and schedule preferences are relayed as evidence of Eli's parenting failures. Note: pre-signal per ADD-002. Arc meets numerical ACTIVE threshold (3 signals) but activation is deferred to ROW-6819 per CP2 ADD-002 protocol — coaching admission is the designated arc activation anchor.
exact_quotes: ROW-3628 (Received): 'You miss out on seeing her all the time.'
ROW-3629 (Received): 'You did better while she was in cheerleading then. Quit when she quit. I really hope you weren\'t just making yourself available because there was a court order.'
primary_flags.rf08_mechanism: Availability/loyalty relay: Olivia's schedule and relationship quality are reported through Melissa as evidence of Eli's abandonment arc narrative.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF08-001 WATCHING: 3 signals (S001-S003). Arc has met the 3-signal numerical threshold for ACTIVE promotion under standard protocol, but CP2 ADD-002 designates ROW-6819 (B-018) as the mandatory arc activation anchor. Arc held at WATCHING until B-018.

compound_patterns.description: Olivia availability relay compounds with RF-01 ADD-004: ROW-3627-3630 uses Olivia's engagement history as evidence for the abandonment arc (RF-01) while simultaneously triangulating Olivia's reported experience as co-parenting pressure (RF-08).

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Phase A. Aug-Oct 2023. Third pre-signal confirms the relay-through-Olivia pattern is established well before the coaching admission.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: One Sev-1 pre-signal. Arc at WATCHING with 3 signals — activation held for ROW-6819. The abandonment-arc relay (Olivia's reported experience of Eli's availability) is the clearest pre-signal of the coached narrative that will be explicitly confirmed at ROW-6819.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-01 ADD-004 compound. The abandonment arc ('you miss out on seeing her / you did better when court-ordered') is the same arc delivered explicitly in Olivia's voice at ROW-7752 (B-022-F002, Feb 2025): 'she asked why you used to visit everyday and now you barely do.'
